description: HFM (HF Markets), formerly known as HotForex, is a global multi-regulated broker established in 2010 with over a decade of operation across more than 180 countries. The broker provides trading services for Forex, metals, commodities, indices, stock CFDs, and cryptocurrencies through various account types and trading platforms, including MT4, MT5, and the HFM App.
keyAdvantages: Competitive spreads, especially on Zero accounts
Robust trading platforms (MT4, MT5, HFM App)
advantages: Suitable for everyone from beginners to professionals
disadvantages: Standard account spreads can be higher
Bonus/no-deposit promotions may not be available in all regions

faqs.question: Is HFM safe?
faqs.answer: Yes — it is regulated in many major jurisdictions, including the FCA and CySEC.

faqs.question: What is the minimum deposit?
faqs.answer: Minimum deposit can start from $0, depending on the account type.

faqs.question: Which platforms are supported?
faqs.answer: MT4, MT5, Web, and the HFM App.

faqs.question: What is the maximum leverage?
faqs.answer: Up to 1:2000 (depending on the entity and region).
